canonicalRules.label: Pandora's Box (Revised)
canonicalRules.scope: Primary reference for Boons, standard Purview Boon ladders, Knack/Birthright catalog mechanics, and Purview chapters in that volume. Origin and Hero remain the default for Mortal/Visitation procedure where PB points to them; supplements apply when a feature is explicitly from those books.

api.putItem: PUT /api/data/{name} — replace entire table JSON (Birthright library editor)
